narrative:
Walnut C (precinct in Fairfield County) has 1,094 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
